query: When should an enterprise build custom software versus buying an existing solution? What factors determine the right approach?
What forces drive a startup to pivot its business model? What mechanisms trigger the shift?
What constrains a company's ability to scale from 50 to 500 employees? What are the binding bottlenecks?
Compare growth-at-all-costs strategy versus profitability-first. How do they differ in outcomes?
What limits an enterprise's ability to adopt AI at scale? What organizational constraints exist?
Compare monolithic architecture versus microservices. What are the real trade-offs?
What causes race conditions in concurrent systems? What are the driving mechanisms?
What constrains the adoption of strongly-typed languages in large organizations?
What forces drive the accumulation of technical debt? What mechanisms make it grow?
Distinguish between horizontal and vertical scaling. When does each approach break down?
Compare persuasive writing with expository writing. How do their goals and techniques differ?
What drives creative breakthroughs? What forces enable novel ideas to emerge?
What constrains artistic originality? What limits prevent truly novel creative work?
Distinguish between imitation and inspiration in creative work. Where is the boundary?
What forces drive the adoption of new artistic movements? What causes one style to replace another?
Compare preventive healthcare with reactive healthcare. What are the fundamental trade-offs?
What drives habit formation? What forces make a new behavior stick or fail?
What constrains a person's ability to change their diet permanently? What are the binding limits?
Compare renting versus owning tools and equipment for home projects. When does each make sense?
What limits the effectiveness of personal budgeting? What constraints undermine financial planning?
Distinguish between civil law and common law systems. How do they differ in philosophy and practice?
What drives antibiotic resistance? What biological mechanisms cause bacteria to evolve defenses?
What constrains bridge design? What physical and engineering limits determine span length?
Compare classical conditioning with operant conditioning. How do the learning mechanisms differ?
What forces drive soil erosion? What mechanisms accelerate land degradation?
Compare utilitarian and deontological ethics. How do they resolve moral dilemmas differently?
What drives moral progress in societies? What forces cause ethical standards to evolve?
What constrains ethical decision-making in organizations? What limits prevent people from doing the right thing?
Distinguish between moral relativism and moral universalism. What are the practical implications?
What forces drive whistleblowing? What mechanisms push individuals to report misconduct?
Compare correlation and causation. What distinguishes genuine causal relationships from spurious ones?
What drives survivorship bias? What mechanisms cause it to distort conclusions?
What constrains the reliability of small sample studies? What limits undermine statistical conclusions?
Distinguish between Type I and Type II errors. When does each matter more?
What forces drive confirmation bias in data analysis? What mechanisms reinforce pre-existing beliefs?
Compare persuasion and manipulation. Where is the ethical boundary in communication?
What drives cross-cultural miscommunication? What forces cause messages to be misinterpreted?
What constrains effective communication in large organizations? What bottlenecks limit information flow?
Distinguish between active listening and passive hearing. How do they produce different outcomes?
What forces drive the spread of rumors in social networks? What mechanisms amplify unverified information?
Compare deliberate practice with naive repetition. What distinguishes effective skill-building?
What drives the Dunning-Kruger effect? What cognitive mechanisms cause miscalibrated self-assessment?
What constrains human decision-making under uncertainty? What cognitive limits affect judgment?
Distinguish between System 1 and System 2 thinking. When does each lead to better outcomes?
What forces drive cognitive dissonance resolution? What mechanisms cause people to change beliefs versus behavior?
